response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Audio matched the reference lyrics for '君セン！' and 'ギターと孤独と蒼い惑星' with minor corrections for speech-to-text accuracy (e.g., correcting phonetic fragments/mismatches). 2. JSON Usage: Fully utilized for disambiguating fast-paced lyrics; manually translated and transcribed remaining sections not fully covered by the reference. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timed the title cards during silence to capture visual text triggers, and wrapped all vocal segments tightly to prevent cascading delays during fast lyric transitions.

subtitles.original: どうやらフラグは まだ立っていないみたいだ
subtitles.english: It looks like the flag hasn't been raised yet.

subtitles.original: どんなの気にしない 一直線に進め
subtitles.english: I don't care what kind it is, go straight ahead!

subtitles.original: きっとね 安定だね お決まりの２ショット
subtitles.english: Surely, it's stable. Our usual two-shot photo.

subtitles.original: 二人きりの空間 ３、２、１、OK！
subtitles.english: Our private space, 3, 2, 1, OK!

subtitles.original: 舞い上がっちゃって
subtitles.english: I got so caught up in the moment,

subtitles.original: あとで反省会
subtitles.english: and will have a self-reflection meeting later.

subtitles.original: あるよね わかるよ
subtitles.english: That happens, right? I totally get it.

subtitles.original: 脳内占拠して 眠れないなら
subtitles.english: If it occupies your mind and you can't sleep,

subtitles.original: そわそわして たまらないなら
subtitles.english: If you are so restless you can't stand it,

subtitles.original: いつだって おいでよ
subtitles.english: You can always come over.

subtitles.original: 少しずつ積み上げてゆこう
subtitles.english: Let's build it up, bit by bit.

subtitles.original: ようこそ 無限のパラダイムへ
subtitles.english: Welcome to our infinite paradigm!

subtitles.original: もう いっそ ずっと 一緒にいよう
subtitles.english: Let's just stay together forever.

subtitles.original: とことんまで 笑っていてね
subtitles.english: Keep smiling all the way to the end.

subtitles.original: もっと 知ってほしいんだぞ
subtitles.english: I want you to know even more about me!

subtitles.original: ちょっと掴んだ シャツの裾
subtitles.english: Slightly grabbing the hem of your shirt.

subtitles.original: 最上級を プレゼントしよう
subtitles.english: Let me present you with the highest level of love.

subtitles.original: 深く考えなくてもいいよ
subtitles.english: You don't have to think too deeply about it.

subtitles.original: ただ 楽しいを 続けよう
subtitles.english: Let's just keep the fun going.

subtitles.original: 繋いだ今日が 明日になってゆくんだ
subtitles.english: The today we connected will become tomorrow.

subtitles.original: よーそろー 全速前進で
subtitles.english: Yosoro! Full speed ahead!

subtitles.original: とんでもない景色 見に行こう
subtitles.english: Let's go see some extraordinary scenery.

subtitles.original: 乗りかかってる 自覚あるでしょ？
subtitles.english: You realize you're already on board, right?

subtitles.original: さんざん そこらの 遊びじゃもう
subtitles.english: With just any old game,

subtitles.original: 満足できないくらい
subtitles.english: to the point where you can't be satisfied anymore,

subtitles.original: 夢中になれる 夢中にさせる
subtitles.english: you can get hooked, I'll make you obsessed.

subtitles.original: ようこそ 素敵なテーマパークへ
subtitles.english: Welcome to a wonderful theme park!

subtitles.original: もう いっそ 全部 忘れちゃえ
subtitles.english: Why not just forget everything else?

subtitles.original: リア友は 私だけ見て
subtitles.english: My real-life friends, look only at me.

subtitles.original: おとなしくするの 無理だぞ
subtitles.english: It's impossible to behave quietly!

subtitles.original: ちょっと考えられないくらい
subtitles.english: To the point that's almost unthinkable,

subtitles.original: 愛をあげる 君が好きだ
subtitles.english: I'll give you my love, I love you.

subtitles.original: 時間なんて 関係ないさ
subtitles.english: Time doesn't matter anyway.

subtitles.original: いま立って ほら 雪崩れちゃうじゃん
subtitles.english: Look, you're smiling!

subtitles.original: 手を繋いで
subtitles.english: Hold hands,

subtitles.original: 私たち 止められない
subtitles.english: we can't be stopped!

subtitles.original: なんてね
subtitles.english: Just kidding!

subtitles.original: ギターと孤独と蒼い惑星
subtitles.english: [Title: Guitar, Loneliness and Blue Planet]

subtitles.original: 突然降る夕立 あぁ傘もないや嫌
subtitles.english: A sudden evening shower, ah, I don't even have an umbrella, how annoying

subtitles.original: 空のご機嫌なんか知らない
subtitles.english: I couldn't care less about the sky's mood

subtitles.original: 季節の変わり目の服は 何着りゃいいんだろ
subtitles.english: What should I wear during the change of seasons?

subtitles.original: 春と秋 どこいっちゃったんだよ
subtitles.english: Where did spring and autumn go?

subtitles.original: 息も出来ない 情報の圧力
subtitles.english: The pressure of information is so suffocating

subtitles.original: めまいの螺旋だ わたしはどこにいる
subtitles.english: A spiral of dizziness, where am I?

subtitles.original: こんなに こんなに 息の音がするのに
subtitles.english: Even though I can hear the sound of breathing so clearly,

subtitles.original: 変だね 世界の音（ね）がしない
subtitles.english: How strange, the world makes no sound

subtitles.original: 足りない 足りない 誰にも気づかれない
subtitles.english: Not enough, not enough, unnoticed by anyone

subtitles.original: 殴り書きみたいな音 出せない状態で叫んだよ
subtitles.english: I screamed out in a state where I couldn't even make scribbled sounds

subtitles.original: 「ありのまま」なんて 誰に見せるんだ
subtitles.english: To whom would I show my "true self"?

subtitles.original: 馬鹿なわたしは歌うだけ
subtitles.english: A fool like me can only sing

subtitles.original: ぶちまけちゃおうか 星に
subtitles.english: Should I spill it all out to the stars?

subtitles.original: エリクサーに張り替える作業も 何度目なんだ
subtitles.english: How many times have I re-strung my guitar with Elixirs?

subtitles.original: 欠けた爪を 少し触る
subtitles.english: Gently touching my chipped fingernails

subtitles.original: 半径３００ミリの体で 必死に鳴いてる
subtitles.english: Screaming with all my might in a body with a 300-millimeter radius

subtitles.original: 音楽にとっちゃ ここが地球だな
subtitles.english: To music, this place must be the Earth

subtitles.original: 空気を引き裂いて 空を殴るよ
subtitles.english: Tearing the air apart, I strike the sky

subtitles.original: 何にも起きない 私は無力さ
subtitles.english: Nothing happens, I am powerless

subtitles.original: だけどさ その手で この鉄を弾いたら
subtitles.english: But if I strum these iron strings with this hand,

subtitles.original: 何かが変わって見えた
subtitles.english: it seemed like something changed.

subtitles.original: 眩しい 眩しい そんなに光るなよ
subtitles.english: So bright, so dazzling, don't shine so much.
